beats.speaker: Nazeem
beats.text: Nazeem has spent all morning loudly reminding everyone how important he is in the Cloud District.

beats.speaker: Nazeem
beats.text: Nazeem looks Lydia up and down, sneers at her housecarl's armor, and asks whether she ever gets to the Cloud District.
This puffed-up fool wouldn't last a single day with a real sword in his hand.

beats.speaker: Lydia
beats.text: Lydia coolly informs Nazeem that sworn service to the Dragonborn outranks tending a vegetable patch.

beats.speaker: Nazeem
beats.text: Nazeem splutters, caught completely off guard that a mere housecarl would dare answer him back.

beats.speaker: Nazeem
beats.text: Hmph. Do you even know who I am?
